description: вШЮAbout Us: вШЕLeciRoba always persists in вАЬIntegrity-centered,Quality first and satisfactory servicesвАЭ. вШЮAbout the Product: вШЕCartridge Model: LeciRoba 924 compatible ink cartridges replacement for HP 924 ink cartridges(3 COLOR) вШЕApplication ScenesпЉЪ LeciRoba 924 ink cartridges are Designed for SOHO users. вШЕHigh QualityпЉЪ Equivalent to original quality. вШЕGood Price: It is worth the money. вШЮPrinter Compatible: вШЕHP OfficeJet Pro 8120 8123 8030 8133 вШЕHP OfficeJet Pro 8122e 8124e 8125e 8132e 8134e 8135e 8138e 8139e вШЮPackage Contents: вШЕ1 x Cyan 924 вШЕ1 x Magenta 924 вШЕ1 x Yellow 924 вШЮInstruction Manual: вШЕOur 924 cartridges do not come with a chip, please follow the instructions we have provided as well as the Chip Removal Tool to obtain the OEM chip and install it in the cartridge. вШЕIf a message like "Not Original" is displayed, please click "Yes" or "Next" to allow the printer to continue working. вШЕIf you have any questions, please feel free to contact us directly by sending message, we will reply to you as soon as possible.
